package.inclusions_text:
- Hospital Stay 4 Days ( 2d ICU + 2d Ward)
- Pharmacy - IP Up to Rs. 5000/
- Pharmacy - Cath Up to Rs. 10000/
- Cath Lab Consumables - (Balloon-2, Guide wire- 4, Guiding Catheter-2, Introducer-2)
- Non Ionic Contrast - 300ml
- Cath Lab Charges- 2 Hr
- ECG-4 & Investigations Up to Rs. 5000/
- Ward Consumables-4, Monitor per day-1, Oxygen per hour-1,
- Medical Records>1 day-1, Diet consultation-1
- No DA on Stent

- Hospital Stay 3 Days ( 1d ICU + 2d Ward)
- Pharmacy - IP Upto Rs. 5000/
- Pharmacy - Cath Up to Rs. 10000/- Includes Non Ionic Contrast - 300ml
- Cath Lab Consumables - (Balloon-1, Guide wire- 1, Guiding Catheter-1)
- Cath Lab Charges- 2 Hr
- ECG-4 & Investigations Up to Rs. 5000/
- Ward Consumables- 3, Monitor per day-1, Oxygen per hour-1,
- Medical Records->1 day, Diet consultation-1
- No DA on Stent

- Hospital Stay 3 Days ( 1d ICU + 2d Ward)
- Pharmacy - IP Up to Rs. 5000/-
- Non Ionic Contrast - 300ml
- Cath Lab Consumables - (Balloon-1, Guide wire- 1, Guiding Catheter-1)
- Cath Lab Charges- 2 Hr
- ECG-4 & Investigations Up to Rs. 5000/-
- Ward Consumables- 3, Monitor per day-1, Oxygen per hour-1,
- Medical Records->1, Diet consultation-1
- No DA on Stent

- Hospital Stay 3 Days ( 1d ICU + 2d Ward)
- Pharmacy - IP Upto Rs. 5000/
- Pharmacy - Cath Upto Rs. 10000/
- Cath Lab Consumables - (Balloon-1, Guide wire- 2, Guiding Catheter-1, Introducer-1)
- Non Ionic Contrast - 200ml
- Cath Lab Charges 1 Hr
- ECG-4 & Investigations Up to Rs.5000
- Ward Consumables-3, Monitor per day-1, Oxygen per hour-1,
- Medical Records>1 day-1, Diet consultation-1

package.exclusions_text:
- STENT Charges , Device Charges
- Beyond package days All room rents ,professional fee,investigations and pharmacy etc.
- Additional catheter, wire, sheaths, balloons, CD Charges
- High risk charges depend on patient condition
- Blood bank charges with or without replacement
- Cross consultation, non related investigations and non cardiac procedures
- Food & Beverage (attender food and other than diet)
- Any other profiles ,CT , & other costly Investigations
- Other Services/Attender room charges (if used)
- HBS AG+ ve, HCV +ve, HIV +ve
- All medications and investigations other than Procedure
- Diabetic Management
- IABP Extra, Ventilator extra, Dialysis extra
package.documentation_notes:
- Clean Markdown / PTCA - Single Vessel: Medium match via semantic_name_medium_after_cleanup. Likely same package after enhanced normalization; review exact variant/grade before adding to master.
- Clean Markdown / PTCA - 3 Vessel: Medium match via semantic_name_medium_after_cleanup. Likely same package after enhanced normalization; review exact variant/grade before adding to master.
- Clean Markdown / PTCA - 2 Vessel: Medium match via semantic_name_medium_after_cleanup. Likely same package after enhanced normalization; review exact variant/grade before adding to master.
- Excel Markdown / PTCA - Single Vessel: Medium match via semantic_name_medium_after_cleanup. Likely same package after enhanced normalization; review exact variant/grade before adding to master.
- Excel Markdown / PTCA - 2 Vessel: Medium match via semantic_name_medium_after_cleanup. Likely same package after enhanced normalization; review exact variant/grade before adding to master.
- Excel Markdown / PTCA - 3 Vessel: Medium match via semantic_name_medium_after_cleanup. Likely same package after enhanced normalization; review exact variant/grade before adding to master.
- FC History / PTCA (PERCUTANEOUS TRANSLUMINAL CORONARY ANGIOPLAS: Exact match via exact_package_code. Source code exactly equals Package Master PKGCD.

Version 1:
- Hospital Stay: 4 days (2 days ICU + 2 days ward)
- Pharmacy: IP medicines up to ₹5,000 + Cath Lab medicines up to ₹10,000
- Cath Lab Consumables: Balloon (2), Guide wire (4), Guiding Catheter (2), Introducer (2)
- Non Ionic Contrast: 300ml
- OT & Procedure Charges: Cath Lab (2 hours)
- Investigations: ECG (4) and other investigations up to ₹5,000
- Routine Consumables & Nursing: Ward consumables (4), Monitor (1 per day), Oxygen (1 per hour)
- Medical Records: For >1 day
- Consultations: Diet consultation
- Stent: No DA included

- Stent: No DA included

Version 4:
- Hospital Stay: 3 days (1 day ICU + 2 days ward)
- Pharmacy: IP medicines up to ₹5,000 + Cath Lab medicines up to ₹10,000

package.exclusions_text_clean:
- Stent charges, device charges
- Any stay, services, investigations, or pharmacy beyond the package duration
- Additional catheter, wire, sheaths, balloons, and CD charges
- High-risk charges (depending on patient condition)
- Blood bank charges (with or without replacement)
- Cross-consultations, non-related investigations, and non-cardiac procedures
- Attender food & beverages and additional patient orders
- Other profiles, CT scans, and costly investigations
- Other services and attender room charges (if used)
- HIV, HBsAg & HCV screening
- Any medications or investigations not related to the procedure
- Diabetic management
- Intra-aortic balloon pump (IABP), ventilator, and dialysis charges

pf_analysis.reason: PF priced from the historic P50 — the insurer tariff carries token PF rates (15-Jul Q1)

room_matched_fallback.reason: PF from 11 same-room standard cases billing near P50

warnings: Stay defaulted to the package master's duration — 3 days for [CAR5154] (pre 0 / post 3); cohort history stays as the reference band.
Medical management — Professional Fees priced from billed physician-fee history (P50 ₹64,460, basis Cash); the visit-based fee sheet will refine this.

lines.note: 5% GST on the full room rent (₹7680/day > ₹5,000).
ICU/CCU/ICCU/NICU/HDU room rent is GST-exempt even above ₹5,000.

tax.note: GST is a separate line, additive to the base estimate (not folded into the parity-pinned total).
